---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

::: {.hero-section #top}

::: {.hero-left}

::: {.eyebrow}
Business Analytics Student
:::

# SOPHIA SUFEI CHEN

::: {.hero-subtitle}
I am a Business Studies student at Dublin City University specialising in Business Analytics, with interests in data-driven decision-making, business improvement, and professional development.
:::

::: {.hero-buttons}
[View Projects](sql_analysis.qmd){.primary-btn}
[Contact Me](#contact){.secondary-btn}
:::

::: {.hero-stats}

::: {.stat-box}
### 2026
Expected Graduation
:::

::: {.stat-box}
### 5+
Technical Skills
:::

::: {.stat-box}
### 2
Professional Roles
:::

:::

:::

::: {.hero-right}
![](https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1522202176988-66273c2fd55f?auto=format&fit=crop&w=900&q=80)
:::

:::

::: {.content-section #about}
## About Me

I am Sophia Sufei Chen, a Business Studies student specialising in Business Analytics at Dublin City University. This ePortfolio presents my academic profile, developing technical skills, and professional experience in a structured and professional format.

I am particularly interested in business analytics, customer insight, operational improvement, and using digital tools to support better business decisions.
:::

::: {.content-section #background}
## Background

My background combines academic learning with practical experience in retail, customer service, and accounting support. These experiences have helped me build strong communication, teamwork, organisation, and problem-solving skills.

Through my studies, I have also developed an increasing interest in data analysis, business systems, and how analytics can improve decision-making in real organisations.
:::

::: {.content-section #skills}
## Core Skills

::: {.cards-3}

::: {.card-box}
### Analytics Tools
Excel, SQL, Python, Jamovi
:::

::: {.card-box}
### Business Software
PowerPoint, Word, Xero
:::

::: {.card-box}
### Professional Skills
Communication, teamwork, multitasking, time management
:::

:::

:::

::: {.content-section #projects}
## Projects

::: {.card-box}
### Park & Polish Strategic Analysis
My featured project focuses on the Park & Polish concept and demonstrates how business ideas can be structured, analysed, and presented through data, strategic planning, and visual communication.

[View Project](sql_analysis.qmd){.primary-btn .small-btn}
:::
:::

::: {.content-section #cv}
## CV

::: {.cv-panel}
My CV includes my education, technical skills, and work experience in customer service, retail operations, and accounting support.

[Download CV](assets/cv.pdf){.primary-btn .small-btn target="_blank"}
:::
:::

::: {.content-section .contact-layout #contact}

::: 
## Contact Me

I am open to future learning opportunities, collaboration, and professional connections.
:::

::: {.contact-panel}
**Email:** chensophia0921@gmail.com

**Phone:** +353 0876535880

**Location:** Dublin, Ireland
:::

:::
